text: Hello? Are you there? Hello, yes. How can it help you? Good afternoon. My name is Cassie. So I'm calling because your Medicare member profile hasn't been transferred into Medicare's national database for 2026 yet. And that can hold up your coverage approvals. [BLANK_AUDIO]
